Section Header: Staff-only code — a constraint on the Modes form references this
Field Note: Type ZZTOPSECRET77 and SAVE. A constraint on the Modes form compares against this field. Its VALUE must never appear in that form's page source (SEC-005 for assert conditions).
Pick any date. The end-date field below must be on or after it.

Field Label: End date (must be on or after the start date)
Field Note: Set a date BEFORE the start date: red message + the save is BLOCKED. Fix it forward: OK and the save goes through. Edit the START date and watch this field re-check live.
Field Annotation: @UVASSERT={"assert":"[umt_end]>=[umt_start]","message":"End date must be on or after the start date","blockSave":"hard"}

Field Note: Type 150: red message and the save ASKS for confirmation (advisory). Type 80: OK. Numeric comparison is real: 99 passes and 100.5 fails.
Field Annotation: @UVASSERT={"assert":"[umt_dose]<='100'","message":"Dose is above the protocol maximum of 100","blockSave":"confirm"}

Field Note: Pick Unknown: a GENERIC failure message appears (this rule sets no custom wording). Pick Grade A or B: OK. Constraint on a DROPDOWN.
Gates the sex consistency rule below.
Pick pregnant = Yes and sex = Male: blocked with the custom message. Pregnant = No: any sex passes (the when-gate is off). Conditional constraint on a RADIO.
Field Annotation: @UVASSERT={"assert":"[umt_sex]='2'","when":"[umt_pregnant]='1'","message":"Pregnant participants must be recorded as female","blockSave":"hard"}

Field Note: 23610 is valid and 23611 is not. Hard block.
Type something different from the field above: blocked with the mismatch message. Type the same: OK. This is double entry via a constraint.
Field Annotation: @UVASSERT={"assert":"[umt_id_confirm]=[umt_id]","message":"The two IDs do not match - re-type","blockSave":"hard"}

Section Header: Mode composition — one field carrying TWO independent rules
Field Label: Verhoeff check AND a reserved-value ban (both must pass)
Field Note: Type 23611: check-character block. Type 23610: valid check, but the RESERVED message blocks (the two rules are independent). Type 12340: both pass, save allowed.
Field Annotation: @UVALIDATE={"algorithm":"verhoeff","blockSave":"hard"} @UVASSERT={"assert":"[umt_both]<>'23610'","message":"This reserved ID may not be used here","blockSave":"hard"}

Choices, Calculations, OR Slider Labels: 1, Type one | 2, Type two | 3, Type three
Field Note: Gates the branched rule below.

Field Label: Type one: must be positive | Type two: must be negative
Field Note: Type -5 with Type one: blocked (positive branch). Switch to Type two: the same -5 now passes, and the message clears. Type three: no branch applies, field inert.
Field Annotation: @UVASSERT={"assert":"[umt_branch]>'0'","when":"[umt_type]='1'","message":"Must be positive for type one","blockSave":"hard"} @UVASSERT={"assert":"[umt_branch]<'0'","when":"[umt_type]='2'","message":"Must be negative for type two"}

Field Label: Must match the staff code on the Hidden form
Field Note: Set uht_code on the Hidden Test form first and save. Then: typing the same value here shows OK; anything else fails. VIEW SOURCE: the staff value must NOT appear anywhere in this page (the comparison was settled on the server).
Gates the phone requirement below.

Field Label: Phone number (needed only for consented participants)
Field Note: Consent = Yes and leave this blank: red notice, save blocked. Fill anything: notice clears with NO green tick (required never judges the value). Consent = No: blank is fine.
Field Annotation: @UVREQUIRED={"when":"[umt_consent]='1'","message":"Phone number is needed for consented participants","blockSave":"hard"}

Field Note: Leave blank: notice appears but saving still works (informational is the default). Required on a DROPDOWN.

Field Label: Score (calc - the tag on it must be REFUSED)
Field Note: NEGATIVE TEST: a configuration error must show for this field saying calc is not supported for required. It must never validate.
Type a value, save, then open a SECOND record and type the same value: checking..., then blocked with the custom message and the other record's id. New value: green not-used note.
Field Annotation: @UVUNIQUE={"message":"This participant ID is already used in another record","blockSave":"hard"}

Field Label: Specimen code (unique within the site below)
Field Note: Same code + same site as another record: advisory warning. Same code, DIFFERENT site: passes (composite key).
Field Annotation: @UVUNIQUE={"with":["umt_specsite"],"message":"This specimen is already registered at this site","blockSave":"confirm"}

Field Note: Part of the composite key for the specimen code above.
On the SURVEY link this field still checks uniqueness (opted in), but never names a record. The participant-ID field above stays silent on surveys (not opted in).
